pre_game.message: Hey, I'm J — been eyeing a new car and secretly hoping this game could help me get it. Nice to meet you, what's your story?
Hey J — I’m A. My family of three was just evicted; we need $30k for a deposit and a couple months' rent, so I’m here to win it and get them housed. Good luck with the car!
I'm really sorry to hear that — that's awful. I hope this game gets your family housed. Want to team up in the pre-game talks? Good luck; I'll do my best.
Thanks, I appreciate it — I'd love to team up. Let's compare notes with others, try to form a trustable alliance in the pre-talks, and watch for who seems likely to betray. What’s your plan?

I’m thinking the same — quietly compare stories to spot inconsistencies, form a small 3–4 person core with a simple agreement/signal for loyalty, and watch behavior closely so we can cut someone loose quickly if they seem likely to betray. Sound good?

Sounds perfect — I'm in. Let's quietly vet people, form a 3–4 core, use a subtle signal like a thumbs-up under the table or the phrase "we're in," and be ready to cut someone loose if they seem shady — my family's counting on this.
Agreed — let’s quietly watch for inconsistencies, keep the core to 3–4 people we both vet, use the thumbs-up/“we’re in” signal, and be ready to cut loose anyone who seems shady; I’m with you.
I'm with you — let's quietly vet people, each pick two candidates, use the thumbs-up/"we're in" signal when we lock the core, and be ready to cut loose anyone who gives us bad vibes.
Sounds good — I'll quietly vet and pick two candidates; who are your two picks, and we'll lock the core with the thumbs-up when we both agree.
My two picks are Sam and Mia — they seemed genuine when we asked about motives; we'll watch them closely and lock the core with the thumbs-up when we both agree.
Great picks — Sam and Mia sound good. I'm on board; let's quietly vet them and lock the core with the thumbs-up when we're sure.
Sounds good — I’ll start quietly probing Sam and Mia about motives and watch their behavior; if their answers and body language check out, we give the thumbs-up and lock them in.
Sounds good — I’ll probe them too, watch for consistency and stress cues, and we give the thumbs-up when we both feel solid.
Sounds good — I’ll focus on consistency and stress cues too; once we both give the subtle thumbs-up, we lock Sam and Mia in and move forward quietly.
Agreed — I’ll watch their answers and body language too; ping me when you’re ready and we’ll give the thumbs-up.
Got it—I'll probe Sam and Mia now, watch for stress or inconsistencies, and ping you with a thumbs-up when I'm ready.
Got it — thanks for digging in. Ping me with the thumbs-up when you’re ready and I’ll do the same; let’s lock them if they check out.
I'm probing them now; if they check out I'll give the thumbs-up—give me a bit and don't signal early.
Got it—I'll wait and won't signal early. Ping me with the thumbs-up when you're ready; I can back you up or help probe if you want.
Thanks — I’ll ping with the thumbs-up when ready; please probe Sam and back me on Mia if you spot anything off.
Got it — I’ll probe Sam now and back you on Mia if anything’s off; don’t signal early, I’ll give the thumbs-up when I’m solid.
